raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 469 provides law enforcement with better tools to crack down on looting and impersonation of emergency personnel during wildfires and other emergencies.",
    "AB 469 allows prosecutors to seek stronger penalties for looting.",
    "AB 469 allows prosecutors to seek stronger penalties for impersonating emergency personnel, including peace officers and firefighters.",
    "AB 469 aims to close existing loopholes that can hinder prosecution for looting and impersonation.",
    "AB 469 ensures that protections for communities continue beyond the active disaster and through the recovery and rebuilding process.",
    "AB 469 ensures that individuals suspected of looting or impersonating emergency personnel are taken into custody without citation and release.",
    "Recent arrests in Los Angeles for looting and impersonation demonstrate the ongoing risk to public safety during natural disasters.",
    "Impersonating emergency personnel during evacuations poses significant risks by undermining evacuation efforts and creating confusion.",
    "The legislation aims to provide law enforcement with tools to hold offenders accountable and safeguard communities as they recover from disasters.",
    "The recent fires in Los Angeles have highlighted an increased threat of looting and impersonation of emergency responders."
  ]
}
```
